what: Call the authentication-check SSE endpoint and update authStatus store
why: Determines whether the user has valid Anthropic access (Claude CLI subscription or API key), so Avatar and SettingsPage can show accurate status

success_handling.criteria: Auth status response is received from the backend

decisions.reason: authStatus driven by has_anthropic_access, not cli_installed
decisions.rationale: The meaningful gate is Anthropic access (subscription or API key). CLI installed alone is not sufficient — the user must be able to run AI operations.
